forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KPEMA771EPB8V51SPKAE0PBB
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: d580
+title: 'Commands: replace project.delete with entity.delete in project.yaml; retire DeleteProjectCmd'
+---
+## What
+
+Today `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/project.yaml` declares a type-specific `project.delete` command whose Rust impl (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs::DeleteProjectCmd::available`) only checks `ctx.has_in_scope("project") || ctx.arg("id")`. The context-menu dispatcher passes the target moniker, not a scope chain entry, so availability returns false and **right-click â†’ Delete Project silently fails**. The generalized `entity.delete` already handles `project:<id>` targets via `DeleteEntityCmd` in `entity_commands.rs` â€” this card switches project.yaml to use it and retires `DeleteProjectCmd`.
+
+### Audit before deleting
+
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs::AddProjectCmd` â€” keep (or confirm it's already superseded by dynamic `entity.add:project`; the mod.rs tests note `project.add` is retired in favor of `entity.add:project`, so `AddProjectCmd` may already be dead).
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs::register_commands` line for `project.delete` â€” remove.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs` tests â€” delete the `DeleteProjectCmd` block.
+- Any frontend code that dispatches `project.delete` by name â€” grep and update to `entity.delete` with `target: "project:<id>"`.
+
+### Target shape for project.yaml after this card
+
+```yaml
+commands:
+  - id: ui.inspect
+    context_menu: true
+  - id: entity.delete
+    context_menu: true
+    keys:
+      vim: dd
+      cua: Mod+Backspace
+  - id: entity.archive
+    context_menu: true
+```
+
+### Files to touch
+
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/project.yaml` â€” replace `project.delete` block, collapse `entity.archive` to overlay-only.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs` â€” delete `DeleteProjectCmd` struct + `impl Command` + tests. If `AddProjectCmd` is also unused, delete the whole file (and remove `pub mod project_commands;` from `mod.rs`).
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` â€” remove `project.delete` registration; update `register_commands_returns_expected_count` expected total (currently 63).
+- Frontend grep: `kanban-app/ui/src/**` and `kanban-app/src/**` for `"project.delete"`.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] Replace project.yaml commands list with overlay-only entries.
+- [ ] Delete `DeleteProjectCmd` + tests.
+- [ ] Audit `AddProjectCmd` â€” retire if unused.
+- [ ] Update `register_commands_returns_expected_count` count.
+- [ ] Grep for frontend `"project.delete"` dispatches; migrate to `entity.delete`.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Right-click on a project card shows **Delete Project** â€” clicking it deletes the project.
+- [ ] `project.yaml` entries for `entity.*` commands have no `scope:`, `undoable:`, or `params:` fields.
+- [ ] `DeleteProjectCmd` no longer exists in `project_commands.rs`.
+- [ ] `project.delete` no longer appears in `register_commands()`.
+- [ ] `yaml_hygiene_entity_schemas_overlay_only` passes for `project.yaml`.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] Add `delete_entity_surfaces_on_project_context_menu` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` tests: with scope `["project:backend"]` and target `"project:backend"`, context-menu emission includes `entity.delete` with `available: true`.
+- [ ] Add `delete_entity_deletes_project` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/entity_commands.rs` tests (mirror the existing `delete_entity_deletes_tag` pattern): create a project, call `DeleteEntityCmd::execute` with `target = "project:<id>"`, assert the project is gone.
+- [ ] Remove the `DeleteProjectCmd` block of tests from `project_commands.rs`.
+- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` â€” all tests green.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write both surface and execute tests first, watch them fail (no `entity.delete` in project schema today), then update project.yaml and retire `DeleteProjectCmd`.
+
+#commands
+
+Depends on: 01KPEMA771EPB8V51SPKAE0PBB (entity.delete must not be scope-pinned)
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value: Commands: replace project.delete with entity.delete in project.yaml; retire DeleteProjectCmd

## What

Today `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/project.yaml` declares a type-specific `project.delete` command whose Rust impl (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs::DeleteProjectCmd::available`) only checks `ctx.has_in_scope("project") || ctx.arg("id")`. The context-menu dispatcher passes the target moniker, not a scope chain entry, so availability returns false and **right-click â†’ Delete Project silently fails**. The generalized `entity.delete` already handles `project:<id>` targets via `DeleteEntityCmd` in `entity_commands.rs` â€” this card switches project.yaml to use it and retires `DeleteProjectCmd`.

### Audit before deleting

- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs::AddProjectCmd` â€” keep (or confirm it's already superseded by dynamic `entity.add:project`; the mod.rs tests note `project.add` is retired in favor of `entity.add:project`, so `AddProjectCmd` may already be dead).
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs::register_commands` line for `project.delete` â€” remove.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs` tests â€” delete the `DeleteProjectCmd` block.
- Any frontend code that dispatches `project.delete` by name â€” grep and update to `entity.delete` with `target: "project:<id>"`.

### Target shape for project.yaml after this card

```yaml
commands:
  - id: ui.inspect
    context_menu: true
  - id: entity.delete
    context_menu: true
    keys:
      vim: dd
      cua: Mod+Backspace
  - id: entity.archive
    context_menu: true
```

### Files to touch

- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/project.yaml` â€” replace `project.delete` block, collapse `entity.archive` to overlay-only.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs` â€” delete `DeleteProjectCmd` struct + `impl Command` + tests. If `AddProjectCmd` is also unused, delete the whole file (and remove `pub mod project_commands;` from `mod.rs`).
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` â€” remove `project.delete` registration; update `register_commands_returns_expected_count` expected total (currently 63).
- Frontend grep: `kanban-app/ui/src/**` and `kanban-app/src/**` for `"project.delete"`.

### Subtasks

- [ ] Replace project.yaml commands list with overlay-only entries.
- [ ] Delete `DeleteProjectCmd` + tests.
- [ ] Audit `AddProjectCmd` â€” retire if unused.
- [ ] Update `register_commands_returns_expected_count` count.
- [ ] Grep for frontend `"project.delete"` dispatches; migrate to `entity.delete`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Right-click on a project card shows **Delete Project** â€” clicking it deletes the project.
- [ ] `project.yaml` entries for `entity.*` commands have no `scope:`, `undoable:`, or `params:` fields.
- [ ] `DeleteProjectCmd` no longer exists in `project_commands.rs`.
- [ ] `project.delete` no longer appears in `register_commands()`.
- [ ] `yaml_hygiene_entity_schemas_overlay_only` passes for `project.yaml`.

## Tests

- [ ] Add `delete_entity_surfaces_on_project_context_menu` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` tests: with scope `["project:backend"]` and target `"project:backend"`, context-menu emission includes `entity.delete` with `available: true`.
- [ ] Add `delete_entity_deletes_project` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/entity_commands.rs` tests (mirror the existing `delete_entity_deletes_tag` pattern): create a project, call `DeleteEntityCmd::execute` with `target = "project:<id>"`, assert the project is gone.
- [ ] Remove the `DeleteProjectCmd` block of tests from `project_commands.rs`.
- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` â€” all tests green.

## Workflow

- Use `/tdd` â€” write both surface and execute tests first, watch them fail (no `entity.delete` in project schema today), then update project.yaml and retire `DeleteProjectCmd`.

#commands

Depends on: 01KPEMA771EPB8V51SPKAE0PBB (entity.delete must not be scope-pinned)

 depends_on:

 position_column: todo
 position_ordinal: d580
-title: 'Commands: replace project.delete with entity.delete in project.yaml; retire DeleteProjectCmd'
+title: 'Commands: retire DeleteProjectCmd and project.delete registration (superseded by entity.delete auto-emit)'
 ---
 ## What

-Today `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/project.yaml` declares a type-specific `project.delete` command whose Rust impl (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs::DeleteProjectCmd::available`) only checks `ctx.has_in_scope("project") || ctx.arg("id")`. The context-menu dispatcher passes the target moniker, not a scope chain entry, so availability returns false and **right-click â†’ Delete Project silently fails**. The generalized `entity.delete` already handles `project:<id>` targets via `DeleteEntityCmd` in `entity_commands.rs` â€” this card switches project.yaml to use it and retires `DeleteProjectCmd`.
-
-### Audit before deleting
-
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs::AddProjectCmd` â€” keep (or confirm it's already superseded by dynamic `entity.add:project`; the mod.rs tests note `project.add` is retired in favor of `entity.add:project`, so `AddProjectCmd` may already be dead).
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs::register_commands` line for `project.delete` â€” remove.
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs` tests â€” delete the `DeleteProjectCmd` block.
-- Any frontend code that dispatches `project.delete` by name â€” grep and update to `entity.delete` with `target: "project:<id>"`.
+Once the auto-emit migration lands (card 01KPEN0JMTVSCW8PZW6RRD0NC3), `entity.delete` surfaces on project cards automatically and correctly dispatches to `project::DeleteProject` via `DeleteEntityCmd`. The legacy type-specific `project.delete` command + its Rust impl become dead code. This card removes them cleanly.

-### Target shape for project.yaml after this card
+### Why this is its own card

-```yaml
-commands:
-  - id: ui.inspect
-    context_menu: true
-  - id: entity.delete
-    context_menu: true
-    keys:
-      vim: dd
-      cua: Mod+Backspace
-  - id: entity.archive
-    context_menu: true
-```
+- The YAML cleanup on `project.yaml` happens inside the migration card (deletes cross-cutting opt-ins). What remains is the Rust + registry cleanup:
+  - Retire `project.delete` from `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` if it's still declared there (it was originally planned to move to a `project.yaml` command file in card 01KPEM93Z47JSME10BY1JBGTFM â€” do not create one; just let `project.delete` disappear).
+  - Delete `DeleteProjectCmd` struct, impl, and tests from `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs`.
+  - Remove `project.delete` registration from `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs::register_commands()`.
+  - Update `register_commands_returns_expected_count` expected total.
+  - Audit `AddProjectCmd` â€” the code comments say `project.add` is retired in favor of dynamic `entity.add:project`, so `AddProjectCmd` is likely dead too. Delete if unreferenced; leave if still registered.
+  - Grep `kanban-app/ui/src/**` and `kanban-app/src/**` for string `"project.delete"` â€” migrate any dispatch sites to `entity.delete` with `target: "project:<id>"`.

 ### Files to touch

-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/project.yaml` â€” replace `project.delete` block, collapse `entity.archive` to overlay-only.
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs` â€” delete `DeleteProjectCmd` struct + `impl Command` + tests. If `AddProjectCmd` is also unused, delete the whole file (and remove `pub mod project_commands;` from `mod.rs`).
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` â€” remove `project.delete` registration; update `register_commands_returns_expected_count` expected total (currently 63).
-- Frontend grep: `kanban-app/ui/src/**` and `kanban-app/src/**` for `"project.delete"`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` (or the yet-to-be-created `project.yaml` â€” verify in card 01KPEM93Z47JSME10BY1JBGTFM's output).
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs` â€” delete `DeleteProjectCmd`; audit `AddProjectCmd`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` â€” unregister; update count test.
+- Frontend: `kanban-app/ui/src/**`, `kanban-app/src/**` â€” grep for `"project.delete"`.

 ### Subtasks

-- [ ] Replace project.yaml commands list with overlay-only entries.
-- [ ] Delete `DeleteProjectCmd` + tests.
-- [ ] Audit `AddProjectCmd` â€” retire if unused.
-- [ ] Update `register_commands_returns_expected_count` count.
-- [ ] Grep for frontend `"project.delete"` dispatches; migrate to `entity.delete`.
+- [ ] Delete `DeleteProjectCmd` struct, `impl Command`, and tests.
+- [ ] Remove `project.delete` registration from `register_commands`.
+- [ ] Audit `AddProjectCmd` â€” delete if unreferenced.
+- [ ] Update `register_commands_returns_expected_count` total.
+- [ ] Grep frontend for `"project.delete"`; migrate dispatches.

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] Right-click on a project card shows **Delete Project** â€” clicking it deletes the project.
-- [ ] `project.yaml` entries for `entity.*` commands have no `scope:`, `undoable:`, or `params:` fields.
-- [ ] `DeleteProjectCmd` no longer exists in `project_commands.rs`.
-- [ ] `project.delete` no longer appears in `register_commands()`.
-- [ ] `yaml_hygiene_entity_schemas_overlay_only` passes for `project.yaml`.
+- [ ] Right-click on a project card shows **Delete Project** and deletes the project (verified by matrix test in card 01KPEMFBBFRE1JWRJ9AXQFVSEB).
+- [ ] `DeleteProjectCmd` no longer exists.
+- [ ] `register_commands()` does not register `project.delete`.
+- [ ] `grep -r '"project.delete"' kanban-app/` returns no dispatch sites.
+- [ ] `test_all_yaml_commands_have_rust_implementations` still passes.

 ## Tests

-- [ ] Add `delete_entity_surfaces_on_project_context_menu` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` tests: with scope `["project:backend"]` and target `"project:backend"`, context-menu emission includes `entity.delete` with `available: true`.
-- [ ] Add `delete_entity_deletes_project` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/entity_commands.rs` tests (mirror the existing `delete_entity_deletes_tag` pattern): create a project, call `DeleteEntityCmd::execute` with `target = "project:<id>"`, assert the project is gone.
-- [ ] Remove the `DeleteProjectCmd` block of tests from `project_commands.rs`.
-- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` â€” all tests green.
+- [ ] Add `delete_entity_deletes_project` in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/entity_commands.rs` tests (mirror `delete_entity_deletes_tag`): create a project, call `DeleteEntityCmd::execute` with `target = "project:<id>"`, assert the project is gone.
+- [ ] Remove the `DeleteProjectCmd` test block from `project_commands.rs`.
+- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` â€” all green.

 ## Workflow

-- Use `/tdd` â€” write both surface and execute tests first, watch them fail (no `entity.delete` in project schema today), then update project.yaml and retire `DeleteProjectCmd`.
+- Use `/tdd` â€” add `delete_entity_deletes_project` first; it passes as soon as the prior cards land. Then delete the dead code and re-run tests.

 ## What

-Today `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/project.yaml` declares a type-specific `project.delete` command whose Rust impl (`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs::DeleteProjectCmd::available`) only checks `ctx.has_in_scope("project") || ctx.arg("id")`. The context-menu dispatcher passes the target moniker, not a scope chain entry, so availability returns false and **right-click â†’ Delete Project silently fails**. The generalized `entity.delete` already handles `project:<id>` targets via `DeleteEntityCmd` in `entity_commands.rs` â€” this card switches project.yaml to use it and retires `DeleteProjectCmd`.
-
-### Audit before deleting
+Once the auto-emit migration lands (card 01KPEN0JMTVSCW8PZW6RRD0NC3), `entity.delete` surfaces on project cards automatically and correctly dispatches to `project::DeleteProject` via `DeleteEntityCmd`. The legacy type-specific `project.delete` command + its Rust impl become dead code. This card removes them cleanly.

-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs::AddProjectCmd` â€” keep (or confirm it's already superseded by dynamic `entity.add:project`; the mod.rs tests note `project.add` is retired in favor of `entity.add:project`, so `AddProjectCmd` may already be dead).
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs::register_commands` line for `project.delete` â€” remove.
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/project_commands.rs` tests â€” delete the `DeleteProjectCmd` block.
-- Any frontend code that dispatches `project.delete` by name â€” grep and update to `entity.delete` with `target: "project:<id>"`.
+### Why this is its own card

-
-```yaml

-  - id: ui.inspect
-    context_menu: true
-  - id: entity.delete
-    context_menu: true
-    keys:
-      vim: dd
-      cua: Mod+Backspace
-  - id: entity.archive
-    context_menu: true
-```

+  - Grep `kanban-app/ui/src/**` and `kanban-app/src/**` for string `"project.delete"` â€” migrate any dispatch sites to `entity.delete` with `target: "project:<id>"`.
